name: Down South Barbecue
recipeIngredient: 4 to 5 lbs. pork shoulder roast or fresh picnic
recipeInstructions:
1. Put one sliced onion in the bottom of the crockpot.
2. Add pork roast, cloves, water, and another sliced onion on top.
3. Cover and cook overnight or 8-12 hours on Low.
4. Remove meats, cutting away bone and fat. Drain most liquid from the pot.
5. Reserve the reserved liquid in the refrigerator.
6. Cut meat into small pieces and return it to the pot.
7. Add chopped onion, barbecue sauce, salt, and vinegar if too sweet.
8. Add back fat-skimmed pork liquid as needed.
9. Cover and cook for an additional 1-3 hours on High or 4-8 hours on Low.
10. Stir 2-3 times to break up large meat chunks.
11. Serve onto buns with dill pickle slices.
